Class Drink

java.lang.Object
at.campus02.bsd.Drink
Direct Known Subclasses:
SimpleDrink
public abstract class Drink extends Object
Abstract base class for concrete drink classes

    • Drink

      public Drink(String name)
      Creates a at.campus02.bsd.Drink object with given name

      name - name of the drink

  • Method Details

    • getVolume

      public abstract double getVolume()
      Calculates and returns volume of drink
      Returns:
      the volume of drink in liter

    • getAlcoholPercent

      public abstract double getAlcoholPercent()
      Calculates and returns the alcohol percentage
      Returns:
      alcohol volume percent (e.g. 50)

    • isAlcoholic

      public abstract boolean isAlcoholic()
      Gives information if drink is alcoholic or not
      Returns:
      true when alcoholic liquids are present, otherwise false

      public String getName()
